article_title: HttpClient DNS 问题：PooledConnectionLifetime 与 SocketsHttpHandler
core_theme: HttpClient DNS 过期的根因是 TCP 连接池复用跳过 DNS 解析，通过 PooledConnectionLifetime 和 IHttpClientFactory handler 轮换解决
reader_takeaway: 理解 DNS 过期和 socket 耗尽是同一枚硬币的两面，知道怎么用 PooledConnectionLifetime 和 SetHandlerLifetime 在不同环境中正确配置
summary_angle: 从「复用 HttpClient 导致 DNS 过期」到「有界连接生命周期双杀」的解决路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「The Paradox」节：复用 HttpClient 导致 DNS 只解析一次
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧一条 TCP 连接指向一个褪色/过期的 IP 地址标签，DNS 查询被阻塞

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「PooledConnectionLifetime」和 handler 轮换机制
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央一个连接池，连接在 2 分钟生命周期后退役，新连接触发新的 DNS 查询

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Kubernetes 和轮询 DNS 的对比讨论
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧健康的多 pod 集群，流量均匀分布
一个配置了正确 PooledConnectionLifetime 的健康 HttpClient

main_metaphor: 连接池的生命周期循环：旧连接到期退役 → 新连接建立 → 新 DNS 查询 → IP 更新
primary_subject: 一个带有生命周期计时器的 TCP 连接池，旧连接退役、新连接触发 DNS 查询
subject_action: 连接池正在按生命周期轮换连接，每个新连接触发新的 DNS 解析
composition: 左到右：过期连接退役 → 中央连接池轮换 → 右侧新连接建立、DNS 查询更新
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: cyberpunk comic mood, neon accents, rain-slick surfaces, dense urban tech atmosphere, controlled purple-blue usage
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#12）；赛博朋克的城市网络意象适合表达连接池、IP 路由和网络层级的技术主题
style_safety_note: 使用泛赛博朋克描述，限制紫蓝色使用（controlled usage），不引用具体作品或设计师
draft_goal: 验证连接池生命周期循环和 DNS 刷新的视觉关系
revision_targets: 连接退役/新建的循环表达
赛博朋克风格与技术主题的平衡
轮询 DNS 的负载均衡可视化
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: HttpClient DNS issues — how PooledConnectionLifetime and IHttpClientFactory handler rotation solve DNS staleness through bounded connection lifetimes. Summary angle: From DNS staleness with long-lived connections to automatic DNS refresh through connection rotation. Narrative flow: before-after. Information blocks: Problem — expired DNS connection on the left with faded IP label. Mechanism — central connection pool with 2-minute rotation timer, old connections retiring and new ones triggering fresh DNS lookups. Contrast — healthy multi-pod cluster on the right with balanced traffic. Takeaway — production-ready configured HttpClient. Main metaphor: A connection pool lifecycle cycle — old connections retire, new connections trigger DNS queries. Subject: A connection pool with lifecycle timer, rotating connections and refreshing DNS. Composition: Left-right flow: expired connections retire → pool rotation → new connections with fresh DNS. Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with cyberpunk comic mood, neon accents, rain-slick surfaces, dense urban tech atmosphere, controlled purple-blue usage. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist. Color palette: deep purple-blue, neon cyan, dark gray, warm amber accents. No poster title, no fake UI, no fake terminals.
